text.title: embedding-caching Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for embedding-caching as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Cache keys that include only text hash without model name: emb:{sha256-of-text}.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: When a pipeline switches models (e.g., text-embedding-3-small to text-embedding-3-large), existing cache entries for the old model are returned for the new model's requests. The vectors are from different spaces — retrieval produces wrong results silently.

failure-mode.description: No TTL on Redis cache keys.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Embedding vectors for deleted or updated documents accumulate indefinitely. Redis memory grows unbounded. Cache key space becomes stale over time.
